verification.detail: Kernel executed on Model/Ascend950PR_9599; shapes (16,2048) and (32,4096) verified (atol=rtol=1e-2 vs data*mask*(1/keep_prob)). Total tick 9952 at the 2-shape verifier.

notes: Golden DropoutDoMask apply-phase verified on CANN 9.0.0 simulator on Ascend950PR_9599 (C310). Vector-only two-load masked-multiply (TILE_SIZE=2048, CORE_NUM=16). Comparability: dense float16 keep-mask vs canonical bit-packed uint8 mask; dominant per-element multiply+scale cost is identical; reference is the true aclnnDropoutDoMask.
